problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: Shape memory alloy phase transition may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
